# Registry Module Tags API reference

## Overview

The HCP Terraform Registry Tagging API allows you to categorize and manage registry artifacts (modules, providers, and component configs) with key-value tags. Tags enable you to:

- Organize and categorize your registry artifacts
- Filter and discover artifacts based on project tags

Tags are applied at two levels:
- **Artifact-level tags (Project Tags)**: Applied to the entire module, provider, or component config, inherited by all versions
- **Version-level tags (Environment Tags)**: Applied to specific versions, allowing fine-grained control over version access

The following table lists all the endpoints for managing registry tagging in your organization's private registry:

| Method | Path | Action |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings` | Create a tag binding for a registry module (artifact-level). |
| POST | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/versions/:version/tag-bindings` | Create a tag binding for a specific module version (version-level). |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings` | List all tag bindings for a registry module and its versions. |
| DELETE | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/tag-bindings/:tag_binding_id` | Delete a tag binding from a registry module. |
| POST | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings` | Create a tag binding for a registry provider. |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings` | List tag bindings for a registry provider. |
| DELETE | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/tag-bindings/:tag_binding_id` | Delete a tag binding from a registry provider. |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules?filter[tags]=key:value,key2:value2` | Query registry modules by tag filters (AND logic for multiple tags). |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/tag-bindings` | List tag bindings across the organization (filterable by taggable-type). |
